old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.57","title":"Harden T1000-E DFU port selection","description":"Recover deterministic app/DFU serial-port selection, matching-device 1200-baud transition, explicit custom-port state, and ambiguity failures.","acceptance_criteria":"Mocked zero/one/multiple and re-enumeration cases pass; direct DFU does not touch; app transition follows serial; bash syntax passes; one physical T1000-E flash succeeds.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:59.158293Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:59.158293Z","labels":["hardware"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.57","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T19:09:59.281708Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
